demoBanner.title: ComPDF SDK Enterprise-grade PDF, Conversion solutions built for secure, scalable document workflows.
pdfToolDetail.upload.trialLimit: Trial limits apply (watermark, 10 pages/doc, 1 concurrent task). Unlock full SDK power to remove all restrictions.
pdfToolDetail.seo.special.imageToJson: Image to JSON | Extract Data from Image to JSON Free Online
pdfToolDetail.seo.special.pdfToSearchabl: PDF to Searchable PDF | Convert PDF to Editable PDF Free Online
pdfToolDetail.seo.defaultTitle: {type} | Convert files from and to PDF Free Online
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToWord: Convert PDF documents to Word format with ComPDF's powerful PDF to Word tool for free. Easily edit and manage PDF content in a Word processor.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToExce: Convert PDF documents to Excel format for free with ComPDF's online PDF to Excel tool. Extract data effortlessly for analysis and reporting in Excel.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToSlid: Convert PDFs to Slide presentations quickly using ComPDF’s PDF to Slide tool. Effortlessly turn documents into editable slides.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToImag: Convert PDF pages to high-quality PNG or JPG images free online with ComPDF’s PDF to Image tool. Extract high-quality images from PDFs for easy sharing and editing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToTxt: Convert PDF files to text format for free with ComPDF’s online PDF to TXT tool. Extract text content from PDFs for easy editing and data analysis.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToHtml: Convert PDF documents to HTML format for free with ComPDF’s PDF to HTML tool. Transform PDFs into web-ready content for easy online sharing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToJson: Convert PDF files to JSON with ease using ComPDF online PDF tools. Extract structured data from PDFs for better analysis and apply in various situations.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToCsv: Convert PDF tables to CSV format free online using ComPDF’s PDF to CSV tool. Easily extract data from PDFs into a widely-used CSV format for analysis.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToRtf: Convert PDF documents to rich text format (RTF) for free with ComPDF’s online PDF to RTF tool. Extract and edit content with ease for further processing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToSear: Convert scanned PDF to searchable and editable PDF free online with ComPDF. Use OCR to make your PDF text selectable and searchable.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pdfToOfd: Convert PDF documents to OFD format free online with ComPDF. Easily transform PDF files into OFD for secure sharing and printing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.wordToPdf: Convert Word documents to PDF free online with ComPDF’s Word to PDF tool. Simplify sharing and secure your content by converting DOC files into PDFs.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.excelToPd: Convert Excel spreadsheets to PDF for free with ComPDF’s online Excel to PDF tool. Turn complex data sheets into easy-to-read, secure PDF documents.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.slideToPd: Convert Slide presentations to PDF format easily with ComPDF’s Slide to PDF tool. Turn slides into portable, shareable PDF files quickly.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.pngToPdf: Convert PNG images to PDF documents quickly and easily with ComPDF's PNG to PDF tool. Simplify document creation with seamless image conversion.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.txtToPdf: Convert TXT files to PDF for free with ComPDF’s online TXT to PDF tool. Quickly turn plain text documents into secure and editable PDF files for sharing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.htmlToPdf: Convert HTML webpages to PDF with ComPDF’s online HTML to PDF tool. Effortlessly transform online content into secure, shareable PDF documents.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.csvToPdf: Convert CSV files to PDF with ComPDF’s CSV to PDF tool. Easily create professional-looking PDF documents from CSV data for sharing and printing.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.rtfToPdf: Convert RTF files to PDF free online with ComPDF’s RTF to PDF tool. Easily transform rich text documents into portable, secure PDF files.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToJs: Convert images to JSON format effortlessly with ComPDF free online PDF tool. Convert unstructured to structured data for further analysis.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToWo: Convert images to Word documents free online with ComPDF. Use OCR to extract text from images and save as editable Word files.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToEx: Convert images to Excel spreadsheets free online with ComPDF. Extract tables and data from images into editable Excel files.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToSl: Convert images to Slide presentations free online with ComPDF. Transform image content into editable slides.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToPd: Convert images to PDF documents free online with ComPDF. Combine and transform images into portable PDF files.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToTx: Convert images to plain text free online with ComPDF. Use OCR to extract text content from images.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToHt: Convert images to HTML format free online with ComPDF. Transform image content into web-ready HTML documents.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToRt: Convert images to RTF format free online with ComPDF. Extract and edit content from images in rich text format.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.imageToCs: Convert images to CSV format free online with ComPDF. Extract tabular data from images into CSV files for analysis.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.merge: Merge PDF files online with ComPDF. Combine pages into one organized PDF document quickly and securely.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.split: Split PDF files online with ComPDF. Extract pages and create smaller PDF documents with ease.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.insert: Insert pages into PDF files online with ComPDF. Add new pages to update PDF documents efficiently.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.delete: Delete PDF pages online with ComPDF. Remove unwanted pages and keep documents clean.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.rotate: Rotate PDF pages online with ComPDF. Fix page orientation and export a polished PDF file.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.compress: Compress PDF files online with ComPDF. Reduce PDF file size while keeping document quality.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.addWaterm: Add watermarks to PDF files online with ComPDF. Protect and brand documents in a few steps.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.removeWat: Remove watermarks from PDF files online with ComPDF. Clean up PDF pages quickly.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.encrypt: Encrypt PDF files online with ComPDF. Add password protection to secure sensitive documents.
pdfToolDetail.seo.descriptions.decrypt: Decrypt PDF files online with ComPDF. Remove password protection from accessible PDF documents.
pdfToolDetail.upload.securityNote: * Your files won't be stored on our servers. No need to worry about the security.
pdfToolDetail.upload.shareText: If you find us useful, try to share with your friends!
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.singleHtml: Convert all PDF pages to a single HTML file
Convert all PDF pages to a single HTML file with Outlines
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.multiHtml: Convert each PDF page to a single HTML file
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.multiHtmlW: Convert each PDF page to a single HTML file with Outlines
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.includeIma: Enable this to preserve images in converted files. Allowing OCR will disable this parameter.
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.includeAnn: Enable this to preserve annotations in converted files.
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.formulaToI: Enable this to preserve formulas as image format in the converted file, keeping the original layout. Otherwise, formulas will be treated as plain text.
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.retainBack: Retain page background images during conversion. Only effective when OCR is enabled.
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.allowOcrTi: Enable this when uploading a non-editable or scanned document.
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.discardFor: Discard form submission, import and reset actions
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.discardAnn: Discard all annotations, forms and multimedia
pdfToolDetail.upload.settings.allowDocum: Allow page assembly (insertion/rotation/deletion of pages, etc.)
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidSlide: This file does not seem to be a Slide file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidWord: This file does not seem to be a Word file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidExcel: This file does not seem to be an Excel file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidHtml: This file does not seem to be an HTML file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidPng: This file does not seem to be a PNG file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidTxt: This file does not seem to be a TXT file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidCsv: This file does not seem to be a CSV file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidRtf: This file does not seem to be an RTF file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidJpg: This file does not seem to be a JPG file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidImage: This file does not seem to be an image file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidPdf: This file does not seem to be a PDF file.

pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.recognitionF: Fail to recognize the data, please enable OCR if it is a scanned file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.networkTryLa: Network error, please try again later.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.passwordErro: Password error, please enter the correct password.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.invalidWater: Please select a JPG, JPEG, PNG, or BMP image.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.mergeRequire: Please upload at least two files.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.mergeFileLim: Merge supports up to 5 PDF files.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.insertFileCo: Please select the target PDF and the PDF to insert.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.sys: System error, please try again later.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.fil: Unable to download your uploaded file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: Invalid request parameters, please set valid file parameters.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.uns: This file format is not supported for conversion.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.fil: The file is encrypted, please enter the correct password.
Failed to open the file: the file type is not supported or the file is encrypted.
File too large, please upload a smaller file.
File does not exist or cannot be opened.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.sin: This interface only allows uploading one file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.mer: Merge PDF supports up to 5 files.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.tas: Task does not exist or is invalid.
The number of files for a single task has reached the threshold.
Task has expired and was not executed.
Task must contain at least one file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.aut: API Key is invalid or not provided.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: Request parameters are missing, wrong type, or have invalid enum values.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.con: Mutually exclusive parameters were provided simultaneously.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: The uploaded file type does not meet the interface requirements.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.fil: The number of files does not match the parameter array.
File size exceeds the server limit.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: The output file name is invalid.
Page range is invalid or out of bounds.
Page index is negative or exceeds the document page count.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.pag: No pages to process after parsing.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.pas: The document is encrypted but no password was provided.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.cer: The certificate file cannot be parsed or the format is not supported.
The certificate requires a password but none was provided.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.icc: ICC profile file is required for standardized conversion.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.uns: The enum value is not within the allowed range.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.sig: The specified signature does not exist.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.wat: The specified watermark does not exist.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.bac: No operable background exists in the document.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.hea: No header or footer configuration exists in the document.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.bat: No Bates numbering exists in the document.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.red: No applicable redaction marks were found.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.noC: The operation completed successfully but produced no changes.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.res: Failed to package multiple file results.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.int: Internal server error, please try again later.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.net: Network error, please try again later.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.pag: PDF page count exceeds the limit.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: Authentication credentials are invalid or expired.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.not: Document or task does not exist, or the result file has been cleaned.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.job: Task is not completed, cannot download.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.inv: Task is already in a terminal state, cannot cancel.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.ide: A request with the same idempotency key is being processed.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.pdf: PDF password is incorrect or missing.
PDF format is invalid or file is corrupted.
The PDF uses an unsupported encryption method.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.noT: No table found in the source file.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.out: Insufficient memory during processing, try reducing the file size.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.fil: File cannot be opened or does not exist.
pdfToolDetail.upload.errors.apiCodes.ima: Image is invalid, corrupted, or in an unsupported format.
pdfToolDetail.feedback.title: Looking forward to your feedback!
pdfToolDetail.feedback.satisfactionQuest: Are you satisfied with the document conversion results？
pdfToolDetail.feedback.descriptionPlaceh: Please tell us more details about your issue, or leave your suggestions.
pdfToolDetail.feedback.attachments.title: Attachments
pdfToolDetail.feedback.attachments.desc: The uploaded files are for testing only. (Supported file types: .gif, .png, .jpg, .tif, .jpeg, .bmp, .doc, .docx, .xls, .xlsx, .ppt, .pptx, .csv, .pdf, .rar, .zip, .txt, .xml, .html, .rtf, etc. Max 3 attachments, each up to 30MB.)
pdfToolDetail.feedback.attachments.conse: Agree to obtain this conversion file without manual upload
pdfToolDetail.feedback.policy.prefix: I have read and agreed to
pdfToolDetail.feedback.policy.note: (The data you submit is treated confidentially and will never be disclosed to third parties.)
licenseExpiry.title: License expired
licenseExpiry.description: The current ComPDF license has expired. PDF processing and conversion features are unavailable.
licenseExpiry.hint: Please contact your administrator to upload a new license file.
resultDownload.truncated: Processed the first {processed} pages out of {total}.
